hooks.command: echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"SessionStart\",\"additionalContext\":\"CPM_FM project rule: BEFORE any work in this repo (searching, editing, planning, or delegating to sub-agents), read AGENTS.md first (this repo has no CLAUDE.md; AGENTS.md is the authoritative agent-guidance file). Any feature or requirement change MUST follow the mandatory 8-step Requirement-change workflow in AGENTS.md (update SRS, implement with Satisfies tags, regenerate views, add Verifies-tagged tests, run pytest, update manual test plan/scorecard, bump version). Present a plan and get approval before implementing. Run ALL Python tooling via the .venv interpreter (.venv/Scripts/python.exe -m <tool>: pytest, pip, mypy, ruff) \u2014 never bare python/pip/pytest/mypy/ruff.\"}}"
